title: Tiny Potion
description: This mod adds a tiny potion, craftable with one Bottle o' Enchanting and an ender pearl, meant to be used with chisel mods
body:
# 🧪 Tiny Potion Mod

Shrink down to **6.25% of your normal size** and experience Minecraft from a whole new perspective.

## ✨ Features
- 🧪 **Tiny Potion** — Shrinks the player to 6.25% size
- 🛟 **Reversion Potion** — Failsafe to instantly restore normal size in case of glitches

## 🛠️ Technical Details
- Fabric mod(neoforge coming soon)
- Designed to be stable and multiplayer-friendly
- Includes a built-in failsafe (Reversion Potion)

## ⚠️ Notes
- Effects last **5 minutes**
- If you get stuck tiny, drink the Reversion Potion to reset
- This mod is best when paired with chisel mods, I recommend this one: [Chisels & Bits](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisels-bits-for-fabric)
- I’m working on a more up-to-date chisel mod so this project doesn't need other slow to update mods.
<!-- - 26.1 version coming by 4/5/26-->
